author: numb3r33
name: 1xH100 Screening: Compression + Eval Study
blurb: Non-record 1xH100 screening bundle anchored on a 9x512 SP-1024 dense baseline (`B0`) that reached 1.35375147 post-quant BPB in 600s at 12.78MB artifact size. The accompanying March 26 matrix shows that larger-capacity variants improved pre-quant BPB but often lost after quantization, motivating more work on evaluation strategy and compression-aware training before 8xH100 validation.
